repository_role: HELIX umbrella architecture and coordination registry

resolution_rules.current_default_branch_head: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Embedded commit SHAs are historical observations and must not be treated as the current head after later commits or merges.
resolution_rules.open_pull_requests: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Do not maintain a supposedly canonical embedded open-PR list that becomes stale when this file is committed.
resolution_rules.temporary_write_authority: A temporary write claim is valid only for its named repository branch, declared paths, and open pull request. It expires automatically when that pull request closes or merges.
source_precedence: live GitHub repository, pull-request, review and CI metadata
live deployed or operational evidence when applicable
ChatGPT project instructions and conversation memory

trusted_baseline.observation_semantics: Historical observation of main immediately after HELIX30000 PR #2 merged. Live GitHub determines the current head.

completed_increments.title: Add HELIX conversation-role registry v0.1
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #1 merged after exact-head CI but before the required independent coordination review was completed.

completed_increments.title: Reconcile registry after PR1 merge
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #2 merged after exact-head CI and after its owner-identity review findings were addressed, but without an independent review from a separate GitHub identity.

workstreams.write_owner: HELIX — Coordination and Reality Control conversation
workstreams.objective: Close the stale PR #2 project state and make future reconciliation resolve changing GitHub state live instead of embedding self-invalidating current-head and open-PR claims.
workstreams.authority_expiry_condition: This temporary write claim expires automatically when PR #3 closes or merges; live GitHub state outranks this record.

capability_boundary.repository_writes: Only the two declared permitted paths in anthonyedgar30000/HELIX30000 on chore/reconcile-registry-pr2-merge

verification_criteria: the complete existing CI suite passes on the exact current PR #3 head
the changed-file list contains only the two declared paths
PR #1 and PR #2 remain accurately classified
PR #2's missing separate-identity review remains visible as a governance exception
current default-branch head and open pull requests are resolved from live GitHub metadata
temporary write authority expires from live pull-request state instead of persisting as stable control-tower authority
no runtime, workflow, schema, registry, credential, deployment, cloud or external-repository paths change
workstreams.next_gate: Obtain successful exact-head CI and perform a final read-only diff review. Keep PR #3 draft until Anthony explicitly approves merge. Record a separate-identity review when available; do not fabricate one.

base_observation.evidence_boundary: These are historical observations. Live GitHub determines current head, pull-request state, CI and review status.

authority_boundary.helix30000_control_tower: coordination-only outside an explicitly declared temporary workstream; stable role does not grant repository-write authority
authority_boundary.service_tracer: read-only evidence; PR #27 remains owned by the ServiceTracer Azure Operations conversation
authority_boundary.protocol_kernel: read-only evidence; PR #4 remains owned by the Protocol Kernel and Agent Interoperability conversation
authority_boundary.contextos: read-only evidence; PR #13 ownership remains unresolved until repository-native project state or an explicit handoff establishes it
